package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_buffer_without_grow_known_bound: bytes.Buffer used without Grow when approximate output size is locally visible.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario347Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
